title: A Woman Without Love
writer: Guy de Maupassant, Jaime Salvador, Rodolfo Usigli
actors: Rosario Granados, Julio Villarreal, Tito Junco
plot: After indulging in an affair with a man (a friend of the family) she truly loves, a woman returns to her young son and husband for good, and loses contact with the man. Her husband is unaware of the affair. Twenty years later, the...
